news.headline: World Bank delegation visits Taxila museum, heritage sites
news.summary:
<p>TAXILA: A delegation led by Mamta Murthi, Vice President of the World Bank, visited Taxila Museum and prominent Unesco World Heritage sites on Sunday, reaffirming international interest in Pakistan’s rich archaeological, cultural and religious heritage.</p>
